title: Pauletia gardneri

Pauletia gardneri is native to Brazil and is often found growing in the wild in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been classified based on its physical characteristics and genetic makeup. As a member of the Rubiaceae family, Pauletia gardneri shares similarities with other plants in the same family, such as the coffee and gardenia plants.
